response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 18+ years of software development and relevant developer tools/testing expertise, but critically lacks the minimum 2 years of people management experience required for this manager role. The resume shows no evidence of managing teams, conducting performance reviews, or leading direct reports—essential capabilities for a people-leadership position. This is an exceptional individual contributor who would benefit from gaining formal management experience before pursuing this level.
strengths: 18+ years of software development spanning multiple languages, platforms, and domains with proven technical depth
Direct experience with developer tools (CI/CD infrastructure, test automation frameworks, MCP code generators) and strong testing/TDD background
Demonstrated ability to communicate and mentor through workshops, courses, and open-source projects
concerns: No documented people management experience; resume contains no mention of managing teams, direct reports, performance reviews, or hiring—a minimum requirement
Leadership titles (Staff, Founder) lack detail on team scope, organizational impact, or formal technical leadership responsibilities
Developer tools work is concurrent with other responsibilities rather than a primary focus; lacks deep specialization in build systems or infrastructure at scale
